step_rationale: Oxidative modification of ApoB-lipoproteins in intima; inflammatory drivers.
mechanism: Oxidized phospholipids generated from atherosclerotic lipid oxidation drive plaque inflammation and vascular cell activation in atherothrombotic cascade.
